privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic dataset (website_analytics.csv) containing 250 rows of web analytics data with 13 columns spanning years 2019-2020. The data has known quality issues: Revenue, Sessions, and Pageviews columns contain comma-formatted thousands separators (text format), and Bounce Rate contains percentage symbols. These require Power Query type conversion. The task requires building a Power BI report with four visual types (line chart, table, card, slicer) and one DAX measure (Revenue_Per_Session = DIVIDE(SUM(Revenue), SUM(Sessions))). One discrepancy found: task.json claims 249 rows but actual dataset contains 250 data rows.
